title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system, memo says

content: NEW YORK, March 20 (Reuters) - Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence system will become an official program of record, Deputy Secretary of Defense Steve Feinberg said in a letter to Pentagon leaders, a move that locks in long-term use of Palantir'... [3697 chars]

title: Artificial intelligence helps unlock geothermal potential
description: Geothermal company Zanskar claims its AI models have made more discoveries in three years than the industry found in 30, targeting untapped U.S. resources.
content:
Geothermal energy has been around since earth’s creation and exists almost everywhere, yet harnessing its full potential has proven difficult since viable sources are often difficult to find.

title: 3 men accused of conspiring to smuggle US artificial intelligence to China: prosecutors
description: Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to prosecutors.
content:
Three men were charged with conspiring to unlawfully divert billions of dollars worth of U.S. artificial intelligence technology to China, according to the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York.

title: Some LA judges will use AI as a pilot program - but humans will still rule
description: The artificial intelligence technology will help judges with legal research and even help draft some decisions.
content:
A judicial AI company is teaming up with Los Angeles County Superior Court to provide artificial intelligence technology to some civil courtrooms to assist judges in conducting legal research and even help draft rulings.

title: TAC framed for AI adoption in ACB investigations
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Mar 20: Government of Jammu and Kashmir has constituted a Technical Appraisal Committee (TAC) to evaluate the proposed project on the “Adoption of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in investigative operations in the Anti Corruption Bureau (ACB).” As per the Government order, the committee will be chaired by the Chief Executive Officer, JaKeGA, and includes key members such as the State Informatics Officer of the National Informatics Centre, J&K; Prof Majid Zaman from the Department of Computer Science, University […]

title: AI key to reviving agriculture, boosting farmers' income in Punjab: CM Mann
description: LUDHIANA, Mar 20 : Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Singh Mann on Friday said the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is necessary to revive agriculture and increase farmers’ income as traditional farming is no longer profitable. Addressing a Kisan Mela at Punjab Agricultural University, Mann said the state played a major role during the Green Revolution but this has led to depletion of soil and water resources. He said farm incomes are declining and crop productivity has reached a saturation point, […]

title: Lawyers behind $1.5 billion Anthropic settlement slash fee bid after pushback from judge
description: Lawyers representing authors and publishers in a landmark $1.5 billion copyright settlement with artificial intelligence company Anthropic have lowered their bid for attorney fees in the case by hundreds of millions ​of dollars.
content:

title: White House urges Congress to use a light touch on AI regulations
description: The White House said on Friday that Congress should “preempt state AI laws” that it views as too burdensome, laying out a broad framework for how it wants Congress to address concerns about artificial intelligence.
content: WASHINGTON — The White House said on Friday that Congress should “preempt state AI laws” that it views as too burdensome, laying out a broad framework for how it wants Congress to address concerns about artificial intelligence without curbing growth ... [7653 chars]

title: 6 Ways AI is Revolutionizing Supply Chain and Delivery Operations
description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping supply chains into faster, more adaptive systems that respond to real-world conditions in real time. What used to rely on static planning and manual coordination now runs on continuous data analysis, machine learning models and automation.
